name: Sony MRW-G1 CFexpress Type B/XQD Memory Card Reader
description: Facilitating fast file transfers up to 10 Gb/s, the Sony MRW-G1 is a memory card reader designed specifically for CFexpress Type B memory cards, as well as XQD card types.

features.Key Features:: For CFexpress Type B & XQD Cards | USB 3.1 Gen 2 Interface | Data Transfer Rate: Up to 10 Gb/s | Includes USB Type-C and Type-A Cables
